dialog.enterEmail: Enter your email to receive a password reset link
dialog.checkEmail: Check your email for password reset instructions

messages.linkExpiry: Click the link in your email to reset your password. The link will expire in 1 hour.
messages.cantFindEmail: Check your spam folder or contact support if you continue to have issues.

errors.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
errors.sendFailed: Failed to send reset email. Please try again.
